phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy entry tickets
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo comprar las entradas de acceso?
phrases.pronunciation: BWAY-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-day PWAY-doh kohm-PRAHR lahs en-TRAH-dahs day ahk-SEH-soh?

likely_response.local: En la taquilla principal, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the main ticket office, on the left.

responses.english: At the main ticket office, on the left.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.local: En la taquilla principal, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to rent a locker
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde se alquilan las taquillas aquí?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh seh ahl-KEE-lan las tah-KEE-yas ah-KEE?

likely_response.local: Junto a la recepción principal, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH reh-thehp-thee-ÓN preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: In the locker room, near the entrance.

responses.english: In the locker room, near the entrance.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH reh-thehp-thee-ÓN preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: Junto a la recepción principal, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if sun loungers are available now
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿hay tumbonas libres disponibles ahora mismo?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, eye toom-BOH-nahs LEE-brehs dee-poh-nee-BLEHS ah-OH-rah MEES-moh?

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, some are free right now.

responses.english: Yes, some are free right now.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main swimming pool is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿podría indicarme dónde está la piscina principal?
phrases.pronunciation: Dees-KOOL-peh, ¿poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAHR-meh DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah pee-SKEE-nah prin-see-PAHL?

likely_response.local: Siga recto, está al fondo del complejo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-gah REHTH-toh EHSTÁ AHL FOHN-doh DEHL kohmp-LEH-hoh
likely_response.translation_en: Go straight, it is at the back of the complex.

responses.english: Go straight, it is at the back of the complex.
responses.phonetic: SEE-gah REHTH-toh EHSTÁ AHL FOHN-doh DEHL kohmp-LEH-hoh
responses.local: Siga recto, está al fondo del complejo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach the restaurant area
phrases.text_local: ¿Cómo puedo llegar hasta la zona de restaurantes?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moh PWEH-doh yeh-GAHR AHS-tah lah THOH-nah deh res-toh-RAHN-tehs?

likely_response.local: Suba las escaleras junto al lago artificial.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOO-bah LAHS eh-skah-LEH-rahs HOON-toh AHL LAH-goh ahr-tee-fee-thee-AHL
likely_response.translation_en: Go up the stairs, it is on the upper floor.

responses.english: Go up the stairs, it is on the upper floor.
responses.phonetic: SOO-bah LAHS eh-skah-LEH-rahs HOON-toh AHL LAH-goh ahr-tee-fee-thee-AHL
responses.local: Suba las escaleras junto al lago artificial.
